name: Hip Twists (Advanced, Continuous and Circular)
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Continuous Hip Twists, Natural Top, Rope Spinning, Three Alemanas, Three Threes
following_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twists, Continuous Hip Twists, Circular Hip Twists, Rope Spinning

steps.action: RF diagonal back with partial weight, body turns to left
Transfer weight to LF, slight body turn to right
RF forward in line with LF towards Lady's right side, 1/4 turn to right, body turns slightly more
LF forward and across, 3/8 turn to right, hips turn more than upper body
comments: Turn at end of previous beat. turn is initiated from hips. Hips turn more than upper body. Flexible turn.

steps.action: RF forward and across towards Man's right side, 3/8 turn to left, hips turn more than upper body
comments: Turn at end of previous beat. turn is initiated from hips. Hips turn more than upper body. Flexible turn.

steps.action: LF forward in line with RF, then turn to end side and slightly forward, 1/8 to R then further 1/4 to R
